items.name: Nyst Øsvåling 1323 Steel Helmet
items.description:
Originally an Istvakyan design, the Øsvåling 1323 - christened as such in Nyst service - was the premier helmet of Nystyy's military well into the 15th century. Consisting of a steel shell and simple (initially leather) suspension system, it was designed to provide protection primarily against artillery fragments - although later production runs would experimentally attempt to improve protection against small arms. Thanks to the design's immense simplicity, such helmets are an incredibly common sight across less-industrialised minor nations like Nystyy, and have since proliferated into the hands of civilian collectors.

During the Twilight War, the Øsv.23 was used prolifically by Nyst forces - particularly so in static positions - becoming something of a symbol of the Nyst armed forces, so much so that its design lives on in ceremonial use to this day.
